citations.narrative:
During the layover portion of the transportation journey (waybill # 001-23257463), an 8-week-old puppy was removed
from the primary enclosure and placed in a temporary floor pen in an office in the cargo facility. A facility representative
confirmed that the primary enclosure was not being cleaned. Taking a dog out of its transport enclosure during transit can
result in injury to the animal or its escape. Removal from the primary enclosure during transportation in commerce is
prohibited (except during cleaning as required in § 3.15(b)) unless it is placed in another primary enclosure or a facility
that meets the requirements of § 3.6 or § 3.15.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the airline representative.
n

narrative:
3.18(d) 
   
Care in transit. 
During the layover portion of the transportation journey (waybill # 001-23257463), an 8-week-old puppy was removed 
from the primary enclosure and placed in a temporary floor pen in an office in the cargo facility. A facility representative 
confirmed that the primary enclosure was not being cleaned. Taking a dog out of its transport enclosure during transit can 
result in injury to the animal or its escape. Removal from the primary enclosure during transportation in commerce is 
prohibited (except during cleaning as required in § 3.15(b)) unless it is placed in another primary enclosure or a facility 
that meets the requirements of § 3.6 or § 3.15. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the airline representative.
